metadata.title: HVNPOD — Premium Acoustic Pods
metadata.description: Premium acoustic pods for focused work — without construction. Designed for offices that need privacy fast.

hero.title: Spaces,
hero.subtitle: Reimagined.
hero.description: Acoustic privacy without construction. A room within a room — designed for focus, conversation, and calm.

problem.title: The problem
problem.privacy: No space for private calls or HR conversations
problem.construction: Building rooms means disruption and delay

products.title: The HVNPOD Range
products.subtitle: Three models. One standard: premium.
products.waitlistDesc: Be the first to know when this category launches.

one.name: HVNPOD One
one.description: The essential privacy pod for focused work. Perfect for calls, deep work sessions, and video meetings.

duo.name: HVNPOD Duo
duo.description: Space for two. Designed for private conversations, interviews, and mentoring sessions.

meet.name: HVNPOD Meet
meet.description: A complete meeting space for up to four. Ideal for team huddles, client calls, and presentations.

configurator.title: Configure Your Pod
configurator.subtitle: Build your perfect HVNPOD in 4 steps.

about.title: Designed Around You
about.subtitle: HVNPOD is not just an acoustic pod brand. It is a premium design-led brand creating products and spaces that make life smarter, calmer, and better suited for a new era.
about.mission: Solve real problems with premium, minimal, architectural solutions — designed around the way people actually live and work today.
about.value1: Not aesthetic noise. Every product addresses a genuine need.
about.value2: Architectural rather than gadget-heavy or generic-tech.
about.value3: Designed around the way people actually live and work.
about.value4: Built to scale from pods to smart furniture to modular living.
about.why1: No build-out, no dusty fit-out, no downtime.
about.why2: Clean finish, integrated power, ventilation, and lighting.
about.why3: Three tiers, clear starting prices, volume discounts.
about.principle1: Every element earns its place. If it does not serve a structural, acoustic, or user-experience function, it is removed.
about.principle2: Materials and finishes communicate quality through touch and sight before a single word is read.
about.principle3: Beauty that serves a purpose — never decorative for its own sake.
about.principle4: Knowing what to leave out is as important as what to include.
about.brandVoiceSubtitle: The brand voice in three words.
about.misconception1Truth: It is an architectural acoustic environment.
about.misconception2Truth: Premium engineering, materials, and acoustic performance.
about.misconception3Truth: Studios, clinics, hotels, homes — anywhere acoustic privacy matters.
about.misconception4Truth: Deployed, not built. Relocated, reconfigured, or removed. No permits.
about.misconception5Truth: Technology serves acoustic function. Defined by what it does to your environment.
about.symbolMeaning: The concentric squares represent a room within a room — personal boundaries defined by design.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1: Select from One, Duo, or Meet based on your space needs.
howItWorks.step2: Pick Core, Plus, or Signature for the right level of finish.
howItWorks.step3: Our team visits to ensure perfect placement and setup.
howItWorks.step4: Your pod arrives ready to use in 2–3 weeks.

journal.subtitle: Insights on workspace design, acoustic privacy, and the future of work.
